compiledNativeLoaderInterop.blockedReason: No executable built from the pinned Audacity commit is checked in or available to this repository's test environment.
requiredEvidence: The runner identifies its source revision as 908ad0a526e5bfdab68de780e893cebe172d27eb.
The pinned native loader opens the browser-authored rich-project snapshot.
The pinned native writer saves that loaded project to a new AUP4 snapshot.
The browser reopens the native-writer snapshot with matching sample hashes, summaries, labels, envelopes, effects, pitch/stretch state, opaque nodes, autosave, and history.
